resultList.dtldesc: This gorgeously designed 3 BHK builder floor, facing the west, is up for sale. Property Specifications This builder floor, which enjoys freehold ownership rights, is well maintained despite being 10 to 15 years old. Spread across a carpet area of 1675 square feet, this builder floor on the 3rd floor is blessed with ample natural sunlight and ventilation.  Coming to the floor plan, this builder floor comprises 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, 2 balconies, a living cum dining area, a puja room, and a kitchen with an attached utility area. Overlooking the lush greenery, the balconies are attached to a bedroom and drawing room. Designed in western manner, of the 2 bathrooms, 2 are attached and the remaining one is commonly accessible. Additionally, geysers are set up in the bathrooms so that hot water is always available. Lastly, this builder floor is covered with vitrified tile flooring. Facilities This property comes with prime amenities like covered parking space, round the clock water supply, 100 power backup, security guards, CCTV cameras, and a lift. Locality Commuting to and from this area is hassle free as various public transport facilities, such as taxis, auto rickshaws, and buses, are easily available here. Also, the metro station is located at a very short distance from this property. For banking needs and services, nationalized banks and ATMs are present in the vicinity.

Located in Renuka Sadan Apartments, the flat is well-suited for small families seeking a peaceful yet centrally located residence. With good connectivity, essential amenities, and ample natural light, this property presents a comfortable living option in one of Hyderabads established localities.Property SpecificationsThe apartment is situated on the 1st floor of a low-rise building with a total of 2 floors. It covers a carpet area of 975 sq. ft and is designed with two spacious bedrooms, two bathrooms, a functional kitchen, a living room, and three balconies that enhance ventilation and brightness. The property also includes a puja room. It faces north, ensuring good natural sunlight throughout the day. The flat comes in a semi-furnished state and is available for immediate possession. Flooring is finished with ceramic tiles, and the overall layout is practical and well planned. The age of construction is approximately 15 to 20 years.FacilitiesThe apartment offers one covered and one open car parking space, a rare benefit in this central location. A reliable 24-hour water supply and stable electricity with minimal power cuts add to the convenience. The building does not have a lift, being a low-rise structure, but remains easily accessible. The property is held under freehold ownership, ensuring hassle-free transactions.LocalityNew Nallakunta is a centrally located and well-developed residential area with strong connectivity. Public transport is easily accessible with MMTS trains and RTC bus services nearby, making daily commuting convenient. The property is in close proximity to reputed schools such as St. Hannahs High School, Sri Gurudatta High School, and Care Model High School. Healthcare needs are met with hospitals like Woodlands Hospital and Government Fever Hospital in the vicinity. Shopping options are available at South India Shopping Mall in Abids, and residents will find a range of eateries, banks, and parks close at hand. The locality balances peaceful living with easy access to city conveniences.

This less than 5-year-old property is beautifully maintained and offers a contemporary lifestyle. The freehold ownership rights guarantee a sense of security and a good return on investment.::::::Property Specifications::::::Welcome to this lovely 3 BHK flat, which provides a flawless blend of modern living and heritage values, in a busy location. This vaastu compliant house has an east direction floor plan, with a bright and sunny ambiance throughout the day. With a super area of a spacious 1500 sqft, the flat is located on the 3rd floor of a 5-story building, providing a calm living experience.::::::The interior is semi-furnished, with wardrobes, lights, and fans, thus move-in ready. It contains three large-sized bedrooms and three bathrooms, two attached and one common, all western-standard fittings and geysers put in place for your convenience. Enjoy the fresh air of two balconies, one off a bedroom and one off the living room, both of which have wonderful views of the outdoors.::::::The architecture has a distinct living and dining area, and a puja room. There is a modular but efficient kitchen with the facility of an attached utility area for convenience. Vitrified tiles in advanced finish provide flooring, which also adds to the grandness of the property.::::::Facilities::::::This apartment also has a range of contemporary amenities, such as covered parking space, 24-hour water supply, and 100% backup power to facilitate hassle-free living. Security is given top priority with the availability of a security guard as well as the provision of CCTV cameras all over the compound. With one lift offered for easy access, this flat is ideal for families who desire comfort, security, and an air of luxury for their new home.::::::Locality::::::Located adjacent to Star Hospital, this complex is an ideal blend of connectivity and access. The dwellers will enjoy the benefit of proximity to various schools, and Ratnadeep Super Market, located right in front of the building, ensures shopping accessibility.::::::Convenient public transport options are within easy reach, making commuting a convenient affair. There are ICICI Bank and HDFC ATMs nearby, ensuring necessary banking facilities within easy reach. Construction of a proposed metro station adds to the accessibility, and with the Nanakramguda Cross and ORR just 100 meters away, this location is ideal for convenience as well as ease of access.::

resultList.dtldesc: Giridhari Executive Park, one of the renowned residential projects in Appa Junction, Hyderabad, offers a magnificent 3BHK flat for sale where you and your loved ones get everything you need to experience a better lifestyle. So, hurry up and own the apartment to rejoice in the modern amenities.Property SpecificationsSituated on the 1st floor of a 7 storeyed building, this flat is spread across a super area of 1665 sqft and carpet area of 1500 sqft. To ensure overall prosperity, positivity and good health of the residents, this west facing property is crafted by following all the vaastu norms. Featuring 3 bedrooms, living room, dining room, modular kitchen, 3 balconies and 3 bathrooms, the flat comes in a semi furnished state and is up to date with electrical points. Further, the bedrooms are adorned with wardrobes for systematically placing all your belongings. The modular kitchen is well organised with a cooking slab, sink, cabinets and chimney to ensure hassle free cooking to the lady of the house. There is also a utility attached to the kitchen. Offering unblocked views of the surroundings, the balconies are ideal for enjoying your hot cup of tea or coffee. The flooring of this abode is covered with vitrified tiles which is known for its quality and durability. Lastly, talking about the bathrooms, one has an Indian style toilet while two are western fashioned. All these bathrooms have geysers and are attached to the bedrooms. FacilitiesFor more convenience, Giridhari Executive Park offers top notch amenities like a library and business centre, barlounge, club house, flower gardens, park, jogging and strolling track, outdoor tennis courts, aerobics room, indoor games room, kids play area, meditation area, swimming pool and gymnasium. Other important facilities provided are covered parking space, water supply, power backup, visitor parking, lift, reserved parking, servicegoods lift, rain water harvesting and round the clock security. LocalityThere is a beautiful Kali Mata Temple located nearby. You can easily find numerous schools, hospitals, shopping malls and supermarkets within 2km to 3km while noted banks and ATMs can be found within the vicinity. The residents of this area can easily access the rest of the city as autos and buses are readily available.
